cluster_summaries.label: Growth & Recognition
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees value the firm's elite brand, which provides significant career acceleration and exposure to high-impact work.

cluster_summaries.label: Burnout & Workload
cluster_summaries.summary: Many staff report exhaustion and difficulty maintaining a personal life due to long hours and the transient nature of client projects.

cluster_summaries.label: Unsafe or Unfair Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: Some employees express frustration with internal politics, favoritism, and a high-pressure environment that can feel exclusionary.

cluster_summaries.label: Flexibility & Care
cluster_summaries.summary: While some appreciate the health benefits, many struggle with the lack of balance between professional responsibilities and family time.
